title: Unplanned Absence Spike Detection
dataSources: Primary lanes land inside index hris_secure using hashed identifiers exclusively: sourcetype workday:absence:event carries REST payloads referencing Absence_Plans_Reference plus Time_Off_Entries_Reference nodes mirrored inside Report-as-a-Service Workday_Worker_Absence_Report drops shipped SFTP toward Universal Forwarder monitors or HTTPS modular polls authenticating OAuth Integration System Users; sourcetype adp:wfn:timecard originates Splunk Add-on for ADP Workforce Now modular REST pulls polling Workforce Now Time and Attendance endpoints /time/v2/workers/{aoid}/time-cards emitting premium_pay_codes arrays documenting ABS slices alongside Lifion-compatible Lifion telemetry where tenants bifurcate; sourcetype adp:wfn:absence handles absence-only extracts when payroll separates attendance payloads; sourcetype ukg:wfm_absence bundles Dimensions REST punches enriched via Pay Code mappings aligning ABS versus SCK versus UN_LEAVE semantics sourced People Insights nightly merges; supplemental JDBC projections labeled oracle:hcm_absence optional via Splunk DB Connect warehouse replicas exposing ABS_ABSENCE_ENTRIES facts when SaaS quotas constrain hourly pulls.
app: Splunk DB Connect ([Splunkbase 2686](https://splunkbase.splunk.com/app/2686)) JDBC replicas mirroring ABS_ABSENCE_ENTRIES warehouse projections plus Splunk HTTP Event Collector receivers landing OAuth modular collectors; Splunk Add-on for ADP Workforce Now ([Splunkbase 4538](https://splunkbase.splunk.com/app/4538)) modular REST polling Workforce Now Time and Attendance endpoints; bespoke modular-input apps wrapping UKG Dimensions REST (/api/v1/timekeeping/punches), Ceridian Dayforce EmployeeAttendances, BambooHR gateway.php collectors, Cornerstone OData leaveAccrual bridges; Splunk KV Store collections backing absence_pay_normalize and dow_factors lookups.
spl:
index=hris_secure (sourcetype="workday:absence:event" OR sourcetype="adp:wfn:absence" OR sourcetype="adp:wfn:timecard" OR sourcetype="ukg:wfm_absence") earliest=-84d@d latest=@d
| fields - employee_id associate_oid Worker_ID PersonIdExternal raw_ssn bank_account
| eval hid=coalesce(employee_id_hash,sha256(tostring(coalesce(worker_ref,associate_oid,user_id,person_number,"MISSING"))))
| eval Absence_Plans_Reference=coalesce(Absence_Plans_Reference,Absence_Plan_Reference_ID,"")
| eval Time_Off_Entries_Reference=coalesce(Time_Off_Entries_Reference,time_off_entry_ref,"")
| eval building_id=coalesce(building_id,site_code,Facility_Reference_ID,"UNKNOWN")
| eval shift_code=coalesce(shift_code,crew_schedule_code,"UNKNOWN")
| eval mgr_cluster=sha256(tostring(coalesce(Manager_Worker_ID,supervisor_oid,supervisor_worker_ref,"")))
| eval pcode=upper(trim(coalesce(absence_pay_code,pay_code,payCode,name,premium_pay_codes,"UNK")))
| lookup absence_pay_normalize pcode OUTPUT canonical_leave_family protected_leave_flag
| where match(canonical_leave_family,"^(SICK|NO_SHOW|NS|SCK|UNPLANNED_PTO|CASUAL_LEAVE|EMERGENCY_LEAVE|TARDY)$") AND protected_leave_flag=0
| eval absence_hours=tonumber(coalesce(absence_hours,hours_absent,paid_hours,paid_quantity,"0"))
| eval absence_days=if(absence_hours<=0,0,absence_hours/8)
| eval dow=strftime(_time,"%w")
| lookup dow_factors dow OUTPUT dow_adj
| eval dow_adj=coalesce(dow_adj,case(in(dow,"1","5"),1.15,dow=="3",0.85,1=1,1))
| bin _time span=1d as day_bucket
| eval week_bucket=strftime(_time,"%Y-%W")
| stats sum(eval(absence_days*dow_adj)) as dow_weighted_abs dc(Time_Off_Entries_Reference) as toe_refs max(_time) as day_ts by hid week_bucket day_bucket building_id shift_code mgr_cluster
| where dow_weighted_abs>0
| sort hid week_bucket day_bucket
| streamstats window=1 global=f last(day_bucket) as prev_day by hid week_bucket
| eval gap_days=if(isnull(prev_day),999,(day_bucket-prev_day)/86400)
| eval spell_inc=if(isnull(prev_day) OR gap_days>1,1,0)
| stats sum(dow_weighted_abs) as D sum(spell_inc) as S max(building_id) as building_id max(shift_code) as shift_code max(mgr_cluster) as mgr_cluster by hid week_bucket
| eval Bradford_Factor=pow(S,2)*D
| eval geo_cluster=building_id."|".shift_code."|".mgr_cluster
| stats avg(Bradford_Factor) as avg_bf dc(hid) as workers_touch sum(D) as summed_days sum(S) as summed_spells by geo_cluster week_bucket
| sort geo_cluster week_bucket
| streamstats current=t window=12 global=f avg(workers_touch) as baseline_avg stdev(workers_touch) as baseline_std by geo_cluster
| eval z_score=if(isnotnull(baseline_std) AND baseline_std>0,(workers_touch-baseline_avg)/baseline_std,null())
| where workers_touch>=5 AND ((isnotnull(z_score) AND z_score>=3) OR avg_bf>=200)
| sort - z_score
| table geo_cluster week_bucket workers_touch avg_bf z_score summed_days summed_spells baseline_avg baseline_std
description: Detects statistically abnormal clusters of unplanned absence episodes—sick, no-show, sudden personal leave—rolled through Bradford Factor scoring with spell-aware gaps, geographic triple-keys building × shift × hashed supervisor, day-of-week seasonal adjustment, z-score spikes versus twelve-week trailing baselines, and Splunk cohort suppression ≥5 hashed workers per slice so Operations forecasts understaffed counters before contagion or morale narratives mature.
value: Retail floors, hospitals, logistics hubs, and contact centers tie labor-minute guarantees directly to revenue and patient safety; surfacing Bradford-heavy cohorts alongside geo-temporal contagion footprints lets Workforce Operations redeploy floats, pause discretionary initiatives consuming scarce bench talent, coordinate Sedgwick escalations responsibly, and brief CFO commentary referencing Mercer payroll-drag envelopes plus Gallup engagement deltas without waiting for quarterly HR retrospectives.
implementation: (1) Route hashed absence telemetry exclusively through Heavy Forwarders into index hris_secure with inputs.conf SEDCMD hashing transforms minting employee_id_hash paired KV lookups absence_pay_normalize plus dow_factors nightly.; (2) Align Workday REST Absence_Plans_Reference plus Time_Off_Entries_Reference fragments with ADP Workforce Now time-card premium_pay_codes slices and UKG pay-code dictionaries mapping ABS versus UN_LEAVE semantics.; (3) Schedule Splunk alerts weekly Monday mornings cron 30 7 * * 1-5 referencing cohort-suppressed aggregates honoring ADA carve-outs excluding protected_leave_flag cohorts.; (4) Pair Dashboard Studio overlays with NOAA CSV snow_day_flag commentary feeds plus CDC FluView qualitative bookmarks cited manually outside punitive SPL predicates.; (5) Quarterly reconcile Splunk summed_days totals versus payroll-certified registers documenting variance envelopes beneath three percent drift thresholds documented alongside Finance attestations.
visualization: Dashboard Studio choropleth mapping building_id clusters tinted when z_score breaches three sigma thresholds alongside paired splunk.column weekly stacks plotting workers_touch versus baseline_avg envelopes; splunk.line overlays spanning twelve trailing weeks annotate Mercer commentary bookmarks manually; supplemental splunk.table enumerating summed_spells versus summed_days juxtaposed beside Bradford histogram facets distinguishing acceptable cohorts versus disciplinary tails requiring ER adjudication outside automated alerting.

references.title: Splunk Add-on for ADP Workforce Now (Splunkbase 4538)
CIPD — Health and wellbeing at work surveys
U.S. Bureau of Labor Statistics — absenteeism releases
CDC — Weekly U.S. Influenza Surveillance Report (FluView)
U.S. Department of Labor — Family and Medical Leave Act overview
Gallup — State of the Global Workplace hub

knownFalsePositives: Legitimate influenza or norovirus waves elevate weekly absent curves exactly when CDC FluView ILI percentages crest yet morale stays intact—annotate dashboards with epidemiological overlays rather than punitive workflows. Regional school-board closures dumping childcare burdens onto rotating crews mimic contagion hotspots absent microbiological corroboration—blend district SMS feeds before interpreting spikes as misconduct clusters. Heavy snowfall paired with NOAA winter advisories aligns simultaneous sick-coded stacks across warehouses handling dock staffing interchangeably—suppress escalation macros whenever NOAA CSV stamps confirm hazardous-road commuting envelopes. Post-long-weekend Tuesdays rebound after phantom Friday spikes recorded Saturday overtime swaps distort baseline averages until payroll accountants reconcile swing-shift calendars referencing collective bargaining rider clauses. County courthouse jury summons batches concentrating jurors inside overlapping supervisory hierarchies inflate Bradford denominators temporarily despite lawful civic-duty protections unrelated to absentee abuse narratives. March Madness weekday tournaments historically elevate casual sick Fridays coupled with recovery Mondays inside collegiate-heavy metros—tie athletics calendars sourced via ESPN feeds commentary panels outside punitive SPL predicates. Election-cycle civic-duty clusters cite overlapping precinct staffing swaps misconstrued as chronic tardiness absent municipal clerk confirmations acknowledging lawful civic-leave carve-outs mirrored locally inside Sedgwick narratives. Intermittent FMLA certifications coded mistakenly inside casual buckets inflate frequent-short Bradford footprints nevertheless immunized legally until HR remediations toggle leave_program_flag joins HR analytics lookups referencing intermittent eligibility attestations. Managers approving vacation verbally yet deferring BambooHR approvals convert benign planned stretches into payroll-visible emergency stacks resembling reactive absenteeism absent contemporaneous payroll reconciliation timestamps. Regional payroll desks inconsistently transcribing Sick versus Personal taxonomy shift Bradford tiers materially despite benign intent until absence_pay_normalize KV dictionaries synchronize quarterly Benefits symposium clarifications. Spring-forward daylight-saving Sundays bifurcate spell-gap arithmetic doubling discrete spells absent TZ normalization macros aligning UTC offsets spanning multinational footprints consolidated beneath singular geo_cluster identifiers. Localized religious observance calendars clustering abstentions geographically resemble morale crises absent chaplaincy confirmations validating lawful dietary-fast exemptions enumerated separately inside ethics attestations unrelated to Bradford ladders.
detailedImplementation:
Prerequisites
• **Splunk Enterprise** or **Splunk Cloud** accepts hashed workforce telemetry exclusively inside index **hris_secure** with authorize.conf macros granting srchIndexesAllowed rights only to **hr_analytics personas** cleared through **DPIA reviews**; plaintext employee identifiers disappear at ingest via **inputs.conf** **SEDCMD substitution** paired with **TRANSFORMS** that mint **employee_id_hash** prior to indexer acknowledgement so cohort-suppressed dashboards cannot accidentally resurrect rows beneath five-member thresholds.
• Heavy Forwarders terminate outbound HTTPS modular polls covering **Workday Absence Management** REST paths (/ccx/api/v1/{tenant}/workers/{id}/timeOff) alongside **Report-as-a-Service** exports labeled Workday_Worker_Absence_Report while **Splunk DB Connect** ([Splunkbase 2686](https://splunkbase.splunk.com/app/2686)) JDBC scans optionally hydrate **ABS_ABSENCE_ENTRIES** replicas when SaaS quotas sting during quarter-close reconciliation windows.
• **Splunk Add-on for ADP Workforce Now** ([Splunkbase 4538](https://splunkbase.splunk.com/app/4538)) polls Workforce Now Time and Attendance endpoints (/time/v2/workers/{aoid}/time-cards) landing sourcetype **adp:wfn:timecard** arrays referencing **premium_pay_codes** for ABS slices; complementary collectors wrap **UKG Dimensions REST** (/api/v1/timekeeping/punches) plus **Ceridian Dayforce** EmployeeAttendances payloads covering Pay Code 014 Sick versus 015 Personal distinctions referenced inside workforce-management payroll manuals.
• **KV Store-backed lookups** absence_pay_normalize, **dow_factors**, school_closure_geo, and flu_alert_week refresh nightly via scheduled searches so **Splunk thresholds** inherit contextual overlays without embedding PHI inside dashboards.

**Step 1 — Configure data collection**
Mirror SOAP Get_Workers responses so **Absence_Plans_Reference** identifiers survive beside **Time_Off_Entries_Reference** fragments sourced from REST pulls—both strings appear explicitly inside Splunk props transforms before hashing—to guarantee **stats dc(Time_Off_Entries_Reference)** reflects discrete approvals rather than payroll retries. Normalize **BambooHR gateway.php time_off requests**, **Cornerstone OnDemand OData** leaveAccrual exports, **SAP SuccessFactors Employee Central EmployeeTime** OData envelopes, **Oracle HCM Cloud personalAbsenceEntries** feeds, **Microsoft Dynamics 365 HR HRMAbsenceTransactionEntities** deltas, and ADP JSON blocks through absence_pay_normalize rows mapping vendor aliases SICK, NS, UNPLANNED_PTO, CASUAL_LEAVE, EMERGENCY_LEAVE, TARDY into **canonical_leave_family** buckets while stamping **protected_leave_flag** whenever rows qualify as FMLA, ADA accommodation windows, maternity or parental shields, bereavement, jury service, military orders, disability programs, workers compensation, STD, or LTD episodes employers must exclude from disciplinary **Bradford ladders** according to **U.S. ADA plus EEOC 2024** reminders about attendance contests.

Describe ingestion transports plainly: Universal Forwarder monitors SFTP drops from **Sedgwick**-styled absence integrations remain optional correlates—not eligibility triggers—and **NOAA CSV** extracts keyed by building_id attach **snow_day_flag** overlays suppressing contagion alarms whenever localized storms explain clustered spikes independent of morale decay signals.

**Step 2 — Create the search and alert**
Reuse the canonical SPL packaged inside this UC's spl field—verify hashed identifiers remain stripped via leading fields removals, confirm absence_pay_normalize denies protected_leave_flag rows before **Bradford math** executes, inspect **spell_inc** deltas computed after sorting hid plus day_bucket pairs so consecutive absent weekdays exceeding one calendar gap increment spell counts aligning with **Bradford Factor** spells (S), multiply totals against summed weighted absence days (D) honoring **dow_adj** seasonal coefficients Monday or Friday at roughly 1.15 versus Wednesday near 0.85 whenever dow_factors lookups omit bespoke ratios, derive **Bradford_Factor** via **pow(S,2)*D**, classify bf_band tiers (<50 acceptable, 50-100 monitor, 100-200 informal counseling, 200-450 formal review, 450+ disciplinary escalation per thresholds HR circulated alongside **union bargaining notes**), assemble **geo_cluster** tokens concatenating building_id, shift_code, and hashed supervisor mgr_cluster slices equivalent to cluster-detection guidance building_id × shift_code × manager_id, aggregate weekly **workers_touch** counts with **cohort suppression** workers_touch>=5, compute trailing twelve-week baseline averages via **streamstats window=12** scoped per geo_cluster sorted ascending **week_bucket**, derive **z_score** comparing live absent population versus **baseline_avg** divided by **baseline_std** when variance exists, alert where z_score crosses **three sigma** or avg_bf breaches two hundred behavioral escalation thresholds independent of influenza overlays documented separately inside commentary—not SPL predicates tied to **CDC FluView** **ILI baseline** percentages near 2.5 percent commentary sourced manually outside automated suppression logic.

Throttle alerts per geo_cluster twenty-four hours while permitting HRBP acknowledgement workflows referencing **Dashboard Studio** PNG captures routed Monday mornings cron 30 7 * * 1-5 after weekend ERP reconciliation completes.

**Step 3 — Validate**
Cross-foot summed_days totals versus **Workday Absence dashboards** scoped to identical supervisory cohorts expecting ±3 percent drift attributable to rounding difference between Hours divided by eight transforms versus native Day equivalents embedded inside payroll approvals; reconcile ADP Workforce Now interactive time-cards consoles referencing **associate_oid** hashed counterparts rather than plaintext identifiers.

Benchmark citations belong exclusively inside governance decks—not SPL predicates—covering **CIPD 2024 Health and Wellbeing at Work Survey** averages (UK headline 7.8 annual absence days versus private-sector 5.7 slices), **Bureau of Labor Statistics 2024** absenteeism incidence (3.0 percent among private-sector wage-and-salary workers with 7.2 annual absence-day averages), **Mercer 2024 National Survey of Employer-Sponsored Health Plans** estimating absence-linked payroll leakage eight through fifteen percent inclusive of replacement labor costs, **Gallup 2024 State of the Global Workplace** disengagement multiples (disengaged populations thirty-seven percent higher absenteeism versus engaged counterparts), **SHRM 2024 Total Rewards** noting ninety percent employers sponsoring paid sick buckets averaging eight yearly days.

Ensure intermittent FMLA patterns flagged manually inside HR case tools suppress punitive **Bradford referrals** despite Splunk surfacing elevated frequent-short footprints indicative of chronic illness deserving **ADA accommodations** rather than misconduct narratives.

**Step 4 — Operationalize**
Dashboard Studio compositions blend splunk.choropleth maps referencing building_geo lookups with splunk.column stacks illustrating weekly workers_touch amplitude spikes painted red whenever z_score breaches three alongside splunk.line overlays plotting baseline envelopes versus observed absent populations across week_bucket facets.

Embed Markdown captions tying **Splunk visuals** to workforce continuity rituals distinct from overtime-premium dashboards UC-23.4.7 monitors—here monetary OT pay codes remain deliberately excluded—and clarify **Operations interprets Bradford** escalation tiers alongside staffing swaps coordinated inside **Humanity** or **Reflexis** schedules versus burnout-risk overtime totals tracked separately.

Publish webhook payloads targeting **Microsoft Teams** channels referencing hashed geo_cluster identifiers exclusively while reminding reviewers cohort-suppressed aggregates honor **GDPR Article Five** minimization alongside **EU Working Time Directive 2003/88/EC** sick-leave-during-vacation reclassification audits whenever **Splunk commentary** surfaces phantom spikes traced back to payroll accountants reversing blended buckets.

**Step 5 — Troubleshooting**
• **DST skew** warping spell_inc counters — daylight-saving Sundays lengthen perceived gaps causing Splunk to increment duplicate spells unless timezone normalization executes prior binning via TZ-aware strptime macros aligning America versus Europe sites sharing multinational footprints.

• Cold-start geo_cluster variance starvation — **baseline_std resolves zero** opening twelve-week onboarding windows yielding divide-by-null z_score explosions until **Splunk predicates** gate alerts demanding baseline_std exceeds fractional thresholds referencing UNKNOWN badges rather than pager floods.

• Payroll replay collisions duplicating Time_Off_Entries_Reference GUID strings — nightly payroll reversal batches replicate identifiers falsely expanding toe_refs counts unless dedup clauses precede aggregation keyed **replay_job_id** QA stamps emanating from finance ticketing systems.

• Benefits enrollment reshuffling Absence_Plans_Reference mappings — carriers migrating PTO buckets temporarily miscategorize benign Vacation approvals into UNPLANNED buckets until absence_pay_normalize KV refreshes finalize—monitor nightly lookup cardinality deltas dipping beneath ninety-eight percent coverage expectations documented inside **Splunk REST health probes**.

• Intermittent FMLA coded casually — HR desks forgetting leave_program_flag toggles leave intermittent certifications resembling abusive **Bradford bursts** despite lawful protections demanding Splunk joins reference intermittent_case feeds sourced through Sedgwick or carrier portals prior escalation queues engage.

• Merger integrations splitting building_id namespaces — duplicated codes fracture cohort denominators suppressing spikes indefinitely until **acquisition_crosswalk** lookups reconcile geographic hierarchies synchronized post-close seventy-two hour stabilization checkpoints.

• School_closure_geo extracts exceeding freshness SLA — stale CSV snapshots borrowed from regional districts erroneously mute outbreak commentary panels whenever analysts overlook max_age_days banners Splunk surfaces beside dashboards referencing fourteen-day staleness thresholds.

• NOAA overlays ignoring hyper-local campuses — shared building_id spanning multi-tower complexes mixes contagion narratives absent supplemental **deck_section facets** until facilities telemetry exposes finer staging grids coordinated through union-approved Splunk macros referencing drill-down hierarchies.

• **Cornerstone leaveBalance OData** midday snapshots diverging nightly **Workday reconciliation totals** — midday Splunk pulls oscillate summed_days versus payroll-certified nightly extracts requiring parity macros aligning ± six hour ingestion offsets annotated inside HR ticketing narratives referencing **payroll blackout calendars**.

• Dynamics HR HRMAbsenceTransactionEntities truncated decimals conflicting **SAP EmployeeTime** hourly granularity — naive divide-by-eight conversions distort absence_days inside hourly-paid cohorts remediated via **employment_band** keyed **hours_divisor** lookups refreshed quarterly alongside collective bargaining appendix references.

• Rewards leaderboards referencing Bradford tiers alongside attendance contests — **Ethics councils** insist **Splunk dashboards** omit punitive tiers feeding prize eligibility workflows honoring **ADA carve-outs** forbidding retaliation disguised as motivational contests referencing **Splunk aggregates** absent contextual ER approvals.

• Flu surveillance cadence mismatches — CDC FluView weekly publication latency differs from **WHO surveillance dashboards** causing **Splunk commentary overlays** referencing mismatched epidemic phases whenever analysts paste stale ILI percentages absent explicit week_start stamps aligning **Splunk week_bucket facets** versus epidemiological ISO weeks bundled alongside **Johns Hopkins** historical COVID dashboards analysts cite strictly as contextual overlays rather than automated suppression gates tied to WHO PHEIC status sunsets May 2023 yet continuing lineage surveillance mandates downstream healthcare staffing councils acknowledge manually.
grandmaExplanation: We watch BambooHR sick buckets bunch across neighborhoods before staffing planners reshuffle crews so checkout lanes stay staffed—nothing here tallies overtime coins like finance dashboards elsewhere.
